name: PocketBase protected file access
pocketBaseNote: PocketBase protected files require an auth-derived file token and still apply record visibility checks for the requesting auth context.

cases.name: protected file without token is hidden
cases.pocketBaseNote: Protected files should not reveal their existence to unauthenticated requests.

cases.name: file token request requires auth
cases.pocketBaseNote: A file token must be minted from a valid auth token.

cases.name: owner file token allows download
cases.pocketBaseNote: A valid file token for the owning auth context can download the protected file.

cases.name: expired file token is rejected
cases.pocketBaseNote: Expired file tokens are rejected even if they were originally minted from a valid auth token.

cases.name: other user file token is hidden by record rule
cases.pocketBaseNote: A valid file token from another user still cannot bypass the protected record's view rule.
